hooks.name: Record Check Pass Timestamp
hooks.description: Registra timestamp UTC del último check.sh exitoso en progress/last-check-pass.txt. Se dispara al completar una tarea de spec.

action.command: mkdir -p progress && date -u +"%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ" > progress/last-check-pass.txt && echo "CI timestamp recorded: $(cat progress/last-check-pass.txt)"
